metadata.description: Large scale test fixture with ~1000 tasks and 150 resources

note: This is a placeholder file. The actual large dataset is generated dynamically by the makeData() function with parameters { tasks: 1000, resources: 150, days: 20 } to avoid storing massive JSON files in the repository.
usage: Use makeData({ tasks: 1000, resources: 150, days: 20 }) in tests to generate the large dataset.
